name: gemini-discord
description: Chat with your local Gemini CLI agent from Discord.

settings.name: Boss Discord User ID
settings.description: Stable numeric Discord user ID with full bridge authority.

settings.name: Owner Discord User IDs
settings.description: Discord user IDs allowed by legacy routing/setup flows. This does not grant boss authority.

settings.name: Discord Server ID
settings.description: Server ID where the bot is installed. The bridge discovers usable channels automatically.
